title: Fix foundation-release bundle tar on Windows + gitignore releases/
goal: Make `npm run release:foundation:cut` work on Windows. The bundle step spawned `tar` with native `D:\...` paths, which Git Bash's tar interprets as a remote tape device ('Cannot connect to D:'). Convert OS paths to POSIX for the tar subprocess. Also gitignore `releases/` (a build artifact, like `dist/`) so `publish`'s clean-worktree check passes.

in: scripts/foundation-release/build-release-bundle.mjs: convert archivePath/distRoot to POSIX for tar spawnSync

taskDoc: Discovered 2026-07-22 while cutting base-v0.9.0 on Windows; tar step failed. Minimal POSIX-path fix in createArchive.
